channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT — 159 replies — 636.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT

Open thread • Replies: 159 • Updated: 2026-03-14 15:47 UTC

OP

You may all sperg the fuck out now. Never fucking selling.

Early replies (first 3)

61964214
>ZOG Swift intern casually poops LLM-generated report
>CHAINCHINK IS BOOMING BROS
actually delusional. $9.

61964222
don't care don't care
price price price
you lost the game, stinkies
PERIOD
stop trying to reclaim some shred of lost dignity. just take the heckin' L

61964252
>>61964222
i dont really give a fuck about link but this image disgusts me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61979190
>>61975886
>>10 peels by this ID

bro you got so rattled by a random dude online making for of your dead altcoin that you started tracking his beatoffs

think about that for a sec

fag

61979200
>>61979052
oh look, it's the semantic arguing retard once again, where have you been buddy?
>I cannot comprehend nuances!!!
jeez, it must be tough being such a brainlet kek

61979225
This thread is mostly samefag fudders, isn't it?

61979233
>>61979225
yes yes, le heckin evil fudderinos
so why did you decide to come back?

61979234
>>61979190
lol you're a brown porn addict

61979238
>>61978041
>why would they ever allow the token to accrue value when they can continue siphoning 100% of of the profit indefinitely?
>what company has ever made the decision to make LESS profit?


smart man here
some of you could learn from him


>>61978052
>uncle rico still can't understand that winning the lottery once doesn't mean he'll win again

this post brings up a good point

many of you who bought link back in the day are akin to degenerate gamblers hanging around a horse track. in your head you had some system where you picked out the horse due to specific attributes, and it "worked" for you when you first started gambling

but the years have gone by, and every year you lose a little more. your horse is now consistently losing and you're unable to pick out another winner. despite all evidence to the contrary, "the system still works", you tell yourself, because of that time you hit it big in 2018.

the reality however, is you essentially hit the memecoin lottery, just like so many other altcoin back in those days when there was only a few thousand of them. there's nothing inherently wrong with that, but your misunderstanding of why that happened continues to lose you money

your ego protects you from the realization of course, as it conflicts with the narrative you tell yourself of being a genius investor.

your hubris was your downfall

61979246
>>61979234
>lol

it's not authentic to type that when you're in tears

have you told anyone irl you fight against random dudes who watch porn? what was their reaction? did they ask why you track that or did they try to get away from you really quick bc of how weird it was

61979250
>>61979238
Hubris bros, we are so back.

61979254
>>61979246
>13 peels by this ID
lmao keep jerking adem you little sandnigger gooner fudcuck

61979411
>>61969258
This is like the holocaust for xrpfag

61979738
>>61969992
you're seething tho, keep up unc

61980172
>>61978052
they didn't, the token never accrued value. a ton of people bought the token because it had a good narrative. token price is almost entirely determined by the fantasies people create around them and has nothing to do with any real utility/usecase

61980699
>>61980172
>price is almost entirely determined by the fantasies people create around them and has nothing to do with any real utility/usecase
Like all of crypto

61981186
I don't get how you can all hold Link.
Someone at my work had it, sold at $40 each, made $15.5 mil and quit. Basic wagie job too.

Now? You're under $10, shit, closer to $5 than ever before. When do you think or WHAT do you think will lift you to AT LEAST $20 THIS YEAR?

I'd get in on Link if you could guarantee it'd go above $50. But any and all crypto that isn't BTC seems like shit. ETH and BTC are the only movers, up or down.

Shit, Trump coin went up miraculously and that was a 100% scam!

61981253
>>61981186
I hold LINK because I think it will go up.
What's so hard to understand?

61981257
I OWN FOURTEEN HUNDRED LINK TOKENS

61981785
>>61981186
based yagmi

61981805
>>61981257
You are like little baby

61982541
>>61964199
PRICED
IN

61983468
>>61982626
The corporate action AI thing is such a fucking meme honestly, I bet that won't come online ever, or maybe in 20 years.

61983722
The Great Reset is currently going full steam ahead with the war in Iran. Expect the death of the dollar and the digital ID world to arrive soon.

61983803
>>61983722
i thought it was two weeks away during covid six years ago?

61983810
>>61983722
>>61983803
I left /pol/ forever after the “red deer” larp. There’s just too many retards there now.

61983835
>>61983810
>now

61983838
>>61983835
>t. Wasn’t there in 2011
>t. Is Jewish

61983987
>>61983810
You just ignore the threads that are obvious bullshit. Sounds like you don't have the IQ for this.

61984009
>>61983803
It's all coalescing around 2030.
Are you stupid?

61984201
>>61965521
They literally posted a switch being flipped, then fucking nothing. I sont think they know shit either.

61984205
>>61984009
Great, so we'll all be rich just in time for strict rationing, meat being forbidden, carbon controls and 15 minute cities.

item.title: Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill? — 103 replies — 412.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?

Open thread • Replies: 103 • Updated: 2026-03-14 15:54 UTC

OP

Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?

Just did my taxes MFJ and I got like an $8k refund, normally I pay.

Plus they are cuter and less bitchy than their western counterparts.

Early replies (first 3)

61976375
>>61976281
im tempted for the easymode but cba living in SEA

61976386
I want a cute, loving Nigerian bf who will make me jollof rice, bros...

61976398
>>61976281
>Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?
I have dignity

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61982059
>>61977074
Anon, what do you think incel means

61982073
>>61976281
I don't want any wife

61982087
>>61976281
I did. Now Trump paused visa for 75 countries, her is included. Fate doesn't want me to be happy. Also fuck Trump.

61982094
>>61982087
It took Bloumpf less than a year to go from best Prez ever to worst jewish dick sucking Nero bully scammer ever.

61982242
>>61976281
Because I'm not an ugly, good for nothing, needy, race traitor, loser freak like you.

61982434
>already working on it, just gotta up my passive income then I can retire in Kuala Lumpur and live it up with my asian wives and our kids

>>61978073
A white woman being attracted to you doesn't magically fix her culturally induced mental illness. She'll still believe in retarded ideas like 'marital rape', 'equal pay' and have 20 bodies before you even meet her. The only exception is if she grew up fat or autistic, in which case you have to deal with her being cripplingly insecure and controlling because she thinks you're going to fuck someone else as soon as you meet another girl. Oh and if you ever dare break up with her suddenly you're an abuser and a narcissist so say goodbye to your social circle.

61982549
>>61978075
lmao, I'd convert her to Christianity and raise a ton of Christian babies tbqh

61982701
>>61982242
Still not gonna marry a used up roastie who gonna divorce my ass and try to dominate my life.

61982709
>>61976711
>>61977074
Roastie detected

61983017
South korea is good too because they hate their men. Japan is a trap most fall for snd i always laugh because you have the usual bitch shield plus the societal shamefur shield so they go from medium hard to death wish,

61983031
>>61978075
Eww imagine dealing with this kind of curtained one

61983180
>>61983017
not sure what you're even saying. japanese women are great. they do push for marriage pretty fast but if you keep them at arms length it's all good

61983209
You guys think their families accept USD or gold?

61983268
>>61978888
It's legal to have four wives everywhere, it's just illegal to enter in a state-backed marital contract with more than one at a time.

61983272
>>61981579
>waaaah I deserve a beautiful 18 year old woman even though I'm an ugly weirdo myself
Grow up incel. If you don't you'll be lonely, miserable, and childless until you die.

61983274
>>61982434
Fortunately most women aren't like your incel visions.
My wife doesn't believe in what you said and we were both virgins. She's neither fat nor autistic, she's a normal woman without social media presence.

Most women do not have a social media presence at all. You think the women you see on social media are representative of all women, but you have a sample bias.

Most women are normal. You'd know if you spend less time talking to other incels online and more time with real people in real life.

61983402
>>61977985
I was there for medical treatment and my life expectancy was two years. I've beaten that but could drop dead at any moment, so it's not like I'm in the market for a relationship.

Yeah, I know that anyone could drop dead at any instant, but in my case it's a lot more likely to happen than some thirtysomething in good health.

61983410
>>61976281
why would i want a wife?

61983429
>>61978075
whore fatigue

61983432
>>61976660
>love starts from marriage
betabuxx moment

61983533
>>61983432
do not under any marry a foreign woman and bring her back to the united states. she will become westernized, divorce you and take half your poortfolio. stay in the country you meet her, or go to another one. just not america

61983554
1)She'll start being bitchy once she figures out you're a deadbeat loser
2)Her craziness is much lesser than the latina level but trust me bro, they're insane.
3)The sex will grind to a halt the moment she realises you are a deadbeat
4)She'll want to bring in her village within a few months
5)She'll force you to finance to bring her "cousin" who will be her fuck toy, which means you'll be cucking yourself with your own money.

61983576
>>61983402
so a woman flirted with you then nothing happened
what a disappointing story

61983994
>>61983554
1) not a dead beat loser I make above the median and I had good habits and saved a shitload.
2)That all women trying to shit test, they are at least wary enough if they cheat/divorce she effectively shunned from society
3) I get sex on demand dunno what you talking about
4)total myth, I pay her parents a tithe out of her own pay and they are happy.
5)again don't get some stupid bar girl, nabbed my wife when she was studying in college, 10 year age gap, life is good.

The only way to win a rigged game is not to play.

61984072
>>61981579
>All the good looking women who would make great wives and mothers are taken in high school and college the latest.
It's even more like that in Asia. The local guys get all the decent girls early. Then the passport bros come late to the game and get the leftover desperate losers and hookers.

61984168
>>61983209
They are WAY GOOD LOOKING. They are probably bitches, though.

61984194
>>61976648
Then don't show your money, just go to Thailand/Malasya/Philippines and find a gf...shave your hair

61984204
>>61982549
lotta christians in syria and lebanon already doe

61984220
>>61976281
they all have boyfriends back home and they'll divorce you and take 50% of your marital assets with them back to their home country (a small fortune by turd world jungle gook standards.)

61984224
>>61976281
To much hassle.

item.title: WHAT THE FUCK IS HAPPENING — 53 replies — 180.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHAT THE FUCK IS HAPPENING

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-03-14 15:38 UTC

OP

YOU FUCKING NIGGERS I'M GONNA GET RUINED

Early replies (first 3)

61976923
>>61976906
I promise you, dear Bobo, nothing ever happens.

61976931
>>61976906
my pp is hard

61976942
THIS IS BLANTANT MARKET MANIPULATION. THIS IS DISGUSTING. DISGUSTING BLATANT MANIPULATION.

FUCKKKKKKKKKKKKKK

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977401
>>61977351

What are people even trying to trade on?

> they learn more about Bitcoin and why they don't have enough

Everything else is just gambling.

61977435
>>61977351
Yeah, it's not like it dumps 80% every 4 years

61978612
>>61976906
THIS IS FUCKING BULLSHIT, I DESERVE 45K BTC RIGHT NOW11!!

61978650
shit hasn't been the same since they took out jane street

61978699
BLATANT MARKET MANIPULATION.

JESUSCHRIST, THIS MANIPULATION IS SO BLATANT I'M GOING FUCKING INSANE

61978833
THERE IS LITERALLY AN INFORMATION EMBARGO. IF THE WORLD KNEW WHAT IT'S GOING ON, WE WOULD BE CRASHING!

THEY'VE LITERALLY SUPRESSED OUR FREEDOMS TO AVOID A BIBLICAL CRASH

FUCK YOU, BESSENT DEMON

61978843
uh oh bobos are melting down

rdy to fomo back in at 120k?

61978878
>>61978843
IF YOU KNEW WHAT I KNEW YOU WOULD BE PANICKING.

61978906
THEY'RE MANIPULATING EVERYTHING. I DAMN YOU, BESSENT. I DAMN THE GREAT SATAN.

AND IRAN IS RISING!!!!!!!!!!!

61978907
>>61977104
>just naked short everything that isn't globohomogenized© into the ground forever
>WHYSIT GO UP AAAAAAAA
Exactly.
Is the good ending here that the 'everything bubble' popping is actually a massive global short squeeze that bankrupts every government and institution on the planet and rewards holders for once on this gay earth?
(I know it won't but it would be really fucking funny)

61978924
>>61978833
>>61978906
>i am le mysterious insider with secret squirrel nuts

61978942
>>61978924
IF THINGS ARE GOING SO WELL FOR THE EPSTEIN ALLIANCE, WHY IS THERE A LITERAL INFORMATION EMBARGO ABOUT WHAT IS GOING IN YOUR MOTHER NATION (ISRAEL)?

UH

FUCKING DEMON

61978951
The pump is finally over. Now we can get back to comfy downtrend action for the next 30 days.

61978962
>>61978951
why do you bobos think you have a god given right for it to go down constantly forever, without even a relief pump once every few years?

61978986
>>61978962
I could see your pov if the entire global economy wasn't getting margin called right now, buuuuut yea.

61979014
>it keeps going up
Kek, the entire market is a joke
That being said i'm looking at cashing my btc in 2026 so the line going up is good for me

61979032
JESUSCHRIST, THEY'RE LITERALLY MANIPULATING EVERYTHING FOR NETANYAHU!

WHERE ARE THE FUCKING MORALS? THE FUCKING VALUES!

61979059
>>61979032
Blackmail is a bitch…
Should call it jewmail or mossadmail

61979067
Thanks Netanyahu for pumping my bags

61979071
>>61979059
CANDANCE OWENS IS LITERALLY RIGHT. MOST OF THE AMERICAN AND EUROPEAN LEADERS ARE DEGENERATES AND THE MOSSAD HAS VIDEOS OF THEM PERFORMING PEDOPHILE SATANIC RITUALS.

THAT'S WHY THEY MUST OBEY NETANYAHU. IT'S FUCKING MADNESS.

61979086
>>61979071
Almost $74000 anon!

61979122
>>61977023
>IRAN IS WINNING.
How? All Iran is doing is trying to drag the world economy down with it.
That's not a victory, that's just a well executed last act of revenge. But they are still going down.

61979132
>>61979122
YOU'RE OBVIOUSLY A MIGATARD. DON'T GIVE ME ANY (YOU) AND GO DIE WITH PRIVATE RODRIGEZ FOR ISRAEL

61979201
>>61979014
>oil shortage problem still exists
>"why is it going up???"

61979210
>slurp at 68k
>sell at 73.9
>still lose money because usd has been fucking tanking compared to gbp
Fuck

61979316
>>61977274
cryptos are good for fleeing war

61979567
YOUR MANIPULATION AND YOUR LIES END HERE.

THIS IS A BATTLE FOR HUMANITY. LISTEN TO ME BESSENT. LISTEN TO ME WARMONGERING HEGSERTH. YOUR WRECKEDNESS ENDS NOW!

61979614
>>61976931
I’m cooooming!!!

61984006
>>61977023
>>61976949
>>61976958
I NEEDED ICP TO CRASH AGAIN FUCK YOU MUMUS

61984177
arise my cherub

item.title: No Future in US Stocks — 17 replies — 68.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
No Future in US Stocks

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-03-14 15:43 UTC

OP

And the worst part is, it's going to be the shittiest, crabbiest, slowest rug of all time. One where no one makes any money on the way down. Where time in the market actively makes you poor just because of opportunity cost and USD devalu6eing.

Early replies (first 3)

61976774
>>61976772
REITchads stay winning

61976775
God, one can only hope

61977149
>>61976772
I think it will gorilla nuke to zero in a single candle

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61981159
>>61976772
the only way to thread the needle is stagflation. where asset prices stop going up but don’t necessarily crash and the dollar loses a bunch of value. in fact we’re already in this in real estate, just not stocks yet. a house that hasn’t gone up at least 20-25% since 2021-22 has actually lost value.
>pic related
festival girls are so easy bros. don’t listen to all the doomers who tell you the only way to get laid is to go to some third world shithole, just go to any tourist/party atmosphere type place like a comic book or anime convention, a music or film festival, or a place like south beach, vegas, or nashville. anyplace where the girls are away from home temporarily they become hypersluts. I wouldn’t marry any of them, but if you’re just trying to get laid or get over your woman issues, you don’t have to pay for it or go to a third world country. just go to any big party. and if you’re worried about how to get laid once you get there, just remember that alcohol literally cures autism.

61982479
>>61976772
shes mid

61982756
>Companies don't invest in themselves
but why (You) should?
its their internal business based on hidden agreements
scamming "retail investors" is just small side bonus for em

61983028
>>61981159
that's what i've been saying, house prices have *already* crashed dramatically in terms of real purchasing power

61983045
>>61981159
>alcohol literally cures autism
zoomers don't drink

61983117
>>61976774
lol reits are such a horrible investment. no divvi growth, businesses closing left and right, declining population

61983122
>>61976772
This is the best photo of her

61983231
>>61976772
That is a man

61983244
>>61976772
I've been hearing this nonsense since 2015. In that time, I continued to invest heavily and now I have a huge nest egg that I'm drawing from now in my early retirement. Don't bet against America.

61983261
>>61983244
Yea contrarian America bashing is cute and all but y'all niggas gonna get financially raped betting against the great satan.

61983689
>>61977149
kek

61983693
>>61976772
>bricstranny schizophrenia
There will be extreme capital flight into the US and not out of it.

61983723
>>61983244
Anon...America is an empire in decline, and it shows. There's no way it will recover from all the recent shitstorm anytime soon.

61984192
>>61976772
picrel

61984158

61984189

watchu call me?

item.title: Potential double top on 73.8K — 42 replies — 124.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Potential double top on 73.8K

Open thread • Replies: 42 • Updated: 2026-03-14 15:35 UTC

OP

Last thread: >>61938409

Its been almost 2 weeks and we didn't breach top of last bullrun's "first selloff". IF we will fall from here, and won't touch 90K ish anymore, then now would be a very perfect time to short.

Early replies (first 3)

61979960
>>61979788
Again, a note for newfags. See those 2 tops touching the 78.8K line? Thats a potential double top.
>double top is extremely bearish

And if we fall from here, confirming those double top, then the only thing that follow is a black swan event.

61979972
>>61979960
>78.8K lines
typo, sorry. What i meant was 73.8K red line

61979998
>>61979788
There are still a few 4hr candles that can make this a fakeout to pile on more shorts. Anything is possible in cryptoland. Double tops aren't 100% confirmation every time, and until we break the support line of the trough, it's not a confirmed double.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61980309
>>61980270
This.

>Ape stack line

KEKAROOO

61980317
>>61980284
Good for you, man. I've already taken profits and moved my stop losses. Worst case scenario, I lose 0. Best case scenario, I make some awesome gains.

Let me ask you something, are you from the United States of America?

61980329
>>61980303
The masses are not fully in crypto, far from it. Regardless if the average person ever shorts, general sentiment is that it's going down or hasn't bottomed. I see it more often than not and generally from not very intelligent people. This happened last cycle too. I've already seen it over and over. You should have seen how many people missed BTC at 16k because it was "for sure" going under 10k. Everyone who counter traded that won.

61980346
Look at this beautiful chart. OIL. You see that bounce. Just at the same time as the double top. It's FRIDAY. Here comes the American hubrys. TACO. Everything has come together.

By the way, make sure you take some gains before monday. You know TACO man.

61980408
>>61980329
I'll buy your bags at a 98% discount in a year thanks for holding them for me.

61980523
>>61979960
You know double tops are only bearish if they're confirmed, right? An unconfirmed double top could also be extremely bullish.

61980589
>>61980408
Good luck, statistically you will not. I'll just be buying in that scenario as well, I don't sell for losses.

61982580
Hello??? Where are the anti human warmongering Americans that doubted me? I posted this a few hours ago

>>61980004
>>61980163
>>61980237

When are you gonna learn that your arrogance and your wreckedness don't lead you anywhere? EVERYTHING DEVELOPED JUST AS I SAID

61982598
>>61982580
ur dumb xD

61982599
>>61982580
Hey, retardo, it wasn't a bull trap. There was no break up. It was a simple resistance line. Calm your retarded brown ass down.

61982602
well which we are we going boyos? The break down was just defended kind of nicely...

61982609
>>61982598
>>61982599
YOU KISS MY ASS, warmongering Israeli golems. Just came back from being with my friends, having a great friday, my shorts are printing money while I watch the collapse of the evangelical United Jewish States of America.

And everything went just like I said. I WIN.

No TACO monday is gonna save you, you DEMONS.

61982630
>>61982609
Sorry, I can't understand you with all that sand in your asshole? What's that about Muhammad being a faggot?

61982660
Look how nervous are the warmongering golems >>61982630

They know they've fucked it up this time. The entire world has seen how evil you are.

61982665
>>61980270
Mornin, this is OP
Yes, i am an indonesian. People have know this for a while

>why didn't you use Binance EN
For some retarded reason Binance hide future market's menu when using EN

61982687
>>61980163
We shall wait till Sunday m8. If we wont breach 73.8K till sunday then im positive we'll fall

>war
M8, throughout my years of trading, i learn 1 thing very clear: the news follows the meme lines, not the other way around. I know that sounds retardedly schizoid, but that mindset earns me a decent amount of money

>>61980237
This is the correct mindset. Put your position based on your analysis, put a stop loss, and go touch grass. Newfags should listen to you

>>61980309
Eyy what can i say, im an anon. I wanna add retarded texts to me meme lines

61982706
>>61982602
I have put more shorts in my 90K bear stack. If you wanna ride in, short now m8

>>61982609
>>61982660
M8, if you wanna bring politics, country, or shits, go back to /pol/. This place ain't for sand niggers or indian poo seething. What's important in this thread is that newfags got information from the old ones

61982728
>>61982706
OP is based.

61982825
>>61982687
It's so uncertain, it can go either way, but I'm betting against the people who want lower entry for now. They've become insufferable. I touch grass and if I lose, I learn for the next trade. Never bet your whole bag. Compound your gains. That's how you make it, not blind gambling.

61982906
>>61982728
Thanks. We may have different opinion on >>61980523, but this is /biz/. What matters is in the end we're all become richer day by day, and helping newfags along the way

>>61982825
>its uncertain
Thats what stop loss is for, m8. Good luck

61982947
>>61982609
>being with my friends
you don't have a family? LOL

61982965
It feels great seeing the seething and the shaking of the war mongering evangelical Americans :).

The coffins are coming. MIGA!!

61983010
>>61982947
Stop giving (You)s to unrelated /pol/ posts m8. Reply when they want to discuss the chart

61983025
>>61983010
I'll talk to you the way I wanna talk to you, you got a problem turn off your station

61983051
>>61983025
Thats not me, you donut. The red ID bastard you talk with obviously just trolling or rage baiting

61983069
>>61982906
I think I have a handle on it. I like to set larger stop losses than normal to avoid getting whipped out on small retraces before bigger runs. I know it's riskier, but I have been watching the patterns for years now. I appreciate the support! I hope we all make it.

61983166
>>61983069
My personal stop loss is at 34K. And yea, amen m8, we're all GMI

61983614
I warned you but you didn't listen. You prefered to pay attention to the American golems that want to send their kids to die in the Middle East for Israel.

If you knew what I know, you would have shorted the crap out of the market yesterday. You still have time.

We are witnessing history. The fall of an Empire. And you can short the crap out of US society.

61984128
>>61982665
>Binance hide future market's menu when using EN
weird didnt know that, but good excuse tho

but still beyond that however hard to defend the 'ape stack line' you added to that post
nobody that comes from here and the 2017 era would ever lower himself to use plebbit wsb 2021 memetics

61984169
>>61982687
>i learn 1 thing very clear: the news follows the meme lines, not the other way around
this statement is only accurate for 'crypto news' which is usually bullshit contained to the space itself
right now we have a fast moving event that directly impacts the fundamental basis on which the entire world functions and to top it off we have the orange man tweeting whatever comes to his mind whenever and some of it is even completely made up at times
trillion dollar markets are moving on his xitter reposts since lol truth social and crypto is just collateral damage in this mess as liquidity touches every asset right now

this is one of the few moments that memelines have no predictive power whatsoever since the real driver of the current setup is utterly chaotic
the whales and insider/exchange that print the memelines have no inside to trumps head so they cant set the market
thats where one of the two mechanisms of the predictive power of the memelines comes from: big money prepositioning, in size, something they have foreknowledge of

this is one market i am happily staying out of and if your stated goal of educating newfags is accurate and from the style of your posting it would say it is
the best advise is leave trading this market to the veterans and wait it out till reason returns

item.title: TOTAL. WAGIE. DEATH. — 33 replies — 76.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
TOTAL. WAGIE. DEATH.

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-03-14 15:29 UTC

OP

Step 1. You take out a loan
Step 2. You pay it back

It's really that simple.

Early replies (first 3)

61977668
how do I long homelessness lol

61977694
an unemployed 17 year old with bad credit and no cosigner can borrow up to $12,500 from the feds for their first year of college. Try borrowing $12,500 unsecured with no income and bad credit.
your 2 step is disingenuous because in reality it's
step 1 you apply for a loan
step 2 you get approved/denied for a loan
step 3 you pay it back
but the government is happy to do you a favor and give you a loan you can't be denied for and follows you through bankruptcy.

61977696
>>61977648
Why can't people take accountability for their actions?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977701
Step 1 graduate early.
Step 2 sign pell at 17
Step 3 nobody checks age
Step 4 you made a minor sign a contract?

61977765
>>61977696
Based goycattlenigger.
You're right, fuck those young white men with student loans.
But shaniquas? And her seven kids? We need to support them because it's good for society.
Israel getting an 8 billion dollar aid package for existing? C'mon we like Jews.

61977792
>>61977765
Not my fault pedophile kikes don't age verify.
No sweat

61977914
>>61977694
Step 1 is contingent on the notion that the loan was already approved. If you weren't approved for the loan, you can't subsequently take it out. For example, when you take out the trash, it already implies that the perquisites are fulfilled by the trash can being full. Would you take out the trash if the trash can wasn't full? No, you wouldn't. Second off, your High School level explanation about the process of Step 1 and Step 2 is further diluting the entire conversation by adding nonsensical fluff to entertain the idea that you perceive yourself as smart. By trying to over explain a simple process, you're adding too much information so that it prevents those instructions from being perceived correctly. When a bullet is fired from the barrel of a rifle, the implication is that the bullet was already loaded in the chamber and the rifle was fully cocked.

61977918
>>61977694
on another note I forgot to add, if you plan on taking a girl out on a date. How would you do so if you didn't have a previous agreement from both parties involved? Amerimutt education is really something.

61978929
>>61977696
Frist make jews and "education" mafia take accountability of duping young and stupid people.

61981659
>>61977696
why can't corpos or the feds take accountability for their actions?

61981684
Kek americans continue to suffer.

61981688
>>61977694
i have 800+ credit and cant even get over 12k between two cards

61981699
>>61977648
How come the people who took out those COVID loans got forgiven?

61982190
>>61977648
>>61977694
>the government is happy to do you a favor and give you a loan you can't be denied for and follows you through bankruptcy.
Reminder that Biden approved this

61982204
>>61977648
>Get grant
>Don't have to repay it
Wow that was hard

61982244
Colleges deserve to go bankrupt, no I will not run the academia humiliation gauntlet hoping a horribly overpriced PhD makes me invaluable to some corporation while funding a new football stadium for the school.

61982277
>>61977648
Do I pay off my loans now and forgo the 3k in XTZ over next 12 months?

61982523
>>61977648
>Grabenstein

61982542
>>61977694
Because the interest on that debt is what funds the DoE. The government made it impossible to discharge because the government itself is using arbitrage to buy and sell this debt and protect itself from any downside. Student loans have never been about education or helping students afford higher education. It's to pay for a 100 billion branch of government that indoctrinates your children

61982561
>>61977765
>>61978929
>The Jews forced me to go into hundreds of thousands of dollars of debt to pay for my liberal arts degree! That's why I shouldn't have to pay it back.
What is it with white people becoming whiny little victimized nigger faggots who feel they shouldn't be held accountable for their own actions?

61982603
>>61982561
The entire system is set up to bully children that don't become hardcore leftists and don't take out tens of thousands of debt to learn nothing at college. You don't want to be part of the 70% of uneducated people that voted for orange man, do you goy?

61982607
>>61977648
Stupid poor fag low test reddit soi cuck leftist liberal socialist beta midwits

61982748
I took out loans for med school because gavin newsom will forcibly pay them all back in 2029 anyway and then I'm going to leave the country lmao.

61982770
>>61977648
Hey anons good thing i poked my head in here i need the advice of random retards on the internet.
I got 19k in debt left on my student loan.
I got 27k in the bank, I Can just knock the entire thing out of the park.
But it would leave me pretty skint in terms of cash.
This is my only major payment, outside of mortgage on a condo.

Do you think i should just knock this one out?

61982859
>>61981684
>suffer
no, they will learn to love it and swallow propaganda about how higher education being out of reach for the average person is a good thing.

61982879
1. Loans should be paid back.
2. Education shouldn't require (or provide) loans.
Both of these are true.

61982956
>>61982770
Depends on the rate retard

61982964
>>61982879
Based independent thinker

61982983
>>61982770
Do you enjoy paying interest? You’re throwing money away on interest unless you think you can make higher gains somewhere else(let’s be honest, you’ll probably lose it all on a shitcoin anyways).

61983192
>>61982859
It’s funny how they become third world but are fine with it because ”the government is bad”.

61983344
>>61982770
Use the $27k as down payment for a lambo.
YOLO

61983764
>>61977648
they replaced SAVE with other income driven payment plans like RAP. the default by pulling your tax forms to get your income but you can do a special income verification and submit fake pay stubs to get low or near $0 payments. it's illegal but it's just like tax fraud -- they'll never catch you because trump fired millions of fed government workers at the IRS, department of education, etc.

sorry, but i'm just not going to pay them back!!!

61984150
>>61982983
>>61982956
My biggest issue is i dont wanna be left without a cushion/nest egg and that would wipe me out, but it would set me fucking debt free.
I slept on it, and honestly after sleeping on it, i think i might do it next month, get my mortgage for the month paid, get paid so im sitting at like 7 or 8 k before i drop the hammer.

Not gonna lie i was kinda letting it slowly limp along there during the Biden era and the start of the trump term 2 because i wanted to see if either of them would ACTUALLY do anything to reduce student loans, they did not so fuck it.

item.title: NO MORE RATE CUTS — 49 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
NO MORE RATE CUTS

Open thread • Replies: 49 • Updated: 2026-03-14 14:54 UTC

OP

FUUUUUUUUCK

Early replies (first 3)

61981919
*blue states

61981925
>>61981915
high oil prices are a good thing chuddie

61981931
>Live in red state
>3.71 for gas
Wow, that's soooo bad. A whole SEVENTY ONE extra cent! OOOOOO soooo bad!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61982994
>not using public transportation to get to work
I thought y'all were financially savvy?

61983014
>>61982213
Those are where non-Whites live Anon. White people are the only people that mostly votes Republican…

61983041
This is really bad. It's going to cause a ton of inflation, it's going to drive up the prices of everything. And this time we can blame the oven dodgers without the usual schizo write off.

61983052
>>61982994
My 9 gallon a mile half-tracked SUV with two floors was promised to me 3000 years ago.
(I also don't fit in the bus seats)

61983073
>>61981915
How the hell are gas prices $5 in the US? They have barely moved here in Sweden..

61983082
>>61982994
I do. Every time I look at what cars cost between insurance, gas, maintenance, loans, etc. I'm blown away. Someone else does all the driving, I get to chill and read, it's affordable, I just have to be at the right spot at the right time. Pretty chill desu
>burger carcel fud incoming

61983111
3.19 here in west texas. dont care. i walk to work and to walmart. life is good with minimum car use

61983234
>>61982303
>"all"
>t.yuropoor

61983273
The only time my state actually skyrocketed with gas prices is during biden's administration. But I live a few hours away from sioux falls because it's a bigger city and that gas is even cheaper than what im showing here.

61983292
>>61983273
subhuman trump kike cock sucker

61983307
only an issue for poor commuters

61983319
>>61983307
aka the working class

61983324
>>61982303
lil pup just woke up from a two year long coma lmaooo
it aint 2023 any more lil' bro

61983329
God I fucking love listening to the sound of liberals scream as they starve to death

61983356
>>61983307
>Goods aren't transported using trucks that require petrol and diesel
Where do you live that this is the case?

61983398
>>61981915
It's $3.02 where I live in Ohio.

>>61981981
Cool story we haven't heard a million times bro. How about you actually look at where the crime and niggers are in those "red states", it's all Democrat run major cities. Ohio has 88 counties, only 6 are blue. Guess which ones?
Anyways, EXXON is fleeing New Jersey and moving to Texas. Keep pushing your communist bullshit. We'll see how long your retarded blue states actually last.

61983446
>>61983398
the crime rate in the middle of the forest is low because nobody lives there go figure
dont know how many times different people have to spell this out for you, you fucking retard. trump loves the uneducated for a reason and its because you just eat up their propaganda

61983484
>>61983446
>there are only trump lovers and trump haters. There are no other possibilities. This is the only possible dichotomy.
Who's the retard again?

>the crime rate is low in rural areas because nobody lives there.
Then explain how Tokyo has a lower crime rate than even most rural areas in America.

The problem will ALWAYS be Democrats, niggers and foreigners from 2nd and 3rd world shitholes. The only good foreigners we get are northern Europeans and Japanese.

61983486
>>61983484
didnt ask for a debate from a retard on a fact

61983491
>>61983486
This bot responded 44 seconds after a post. Lmfao.

61983569
>>61983398
MUH texas
MUH crime
ever heard of per capita
texas has been handed over by republicans to india and is now a colony of that street shitting tumor of a country
is this the best you pathetic loser shills can come up with
crime and that stupid false narrative about people from california moving to texas, get some better talking points, faggot
you're fucking retarded calling california a commie shit hole because you think a state that encompasses a majority of the western united states is exactly like berkely or your delusional idea that blizzard runs the state because your bitter they made your loser existence in world of warcraft revolve around the goldshire inn and tranny horsecock draenai roleplay
4th largest economy in the world, faggot
choke on that and cope with the fact your orange god has walked back just in the last week his mass deportation policy and even supports castrating children now with parental consent

61983577
stupid fuck, you're not even from america
or you would be making posts about the orange dipshits disastrous economy killing tariffs instead of making an ass out of yourself trying to defect from the fact gas prices rising are entirely his fucking fault
faggot fucking vpn hoping shill
bitch

61983592
Why would you even bring up Ohio or immigrants you stupid fucking bitch
Your republican candidate for governor is an indian scammer that lied about a cure for alzheimers and said on the republican debate stage that the great replacement is real and he sure acted proud when he said it, you fucking retarded moron faggot

61983597
>>61983329
You dropped this

61983606
>>61981915
im sick of winning bros

61983751
>>61981931
paying more money for the sake of fighting wars on behalf of israel is based, trad, redpilled, AND maga. you lost, trannie!!!!!

61983949
>>61983073
That's in California. I've paid more than $6/gal for gasoline in California and that was years ago Whenever people want to spin up outrage about gas prices, they report the prices from California. California has a pretty toxic combination of the highest gasoline taxes in the US and the most expensive oil and gas regulations in the US. e.g. California requires special California-only blends of gasoline made only in refineries based in California - which they're busily trying to regulate out of existence.

Gas prices have barely moved in the US as well.

61983954
>>61981919
Imagine thinking red and blue matter

61983961
>>61982994
I would unironically rather be unemployed than deal with the humiliation ritual that is public transport.

61984042
Bruuuuh

item.title: 27 VIX edition >Please leave your political posts at the door unless they involve Business or Finance. — 358 replies — 21.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
27 VIX edition >Please leave your political posts at the door unless they involve Business or Finance.

Open thread • Replies: 358 • Updated: 2026-03-13 22:56 UTC

OP

27 VIX edition

>Please leave your political posts at the door unless they involve Business or Finance.

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com
https://www.khanacademy.org/economics-finance-domain

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners: so you feel like in the movies
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101: so zoomers with meme stocks can outperform you
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc smg:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

previously on /smg/
>>61979958

Early replies (first 3)

61980684
market will rally, oil will sell into the close, theres no debating this

61980685
oilads our next move?

61980687
I'm thinking about 650 3/20 SPY PUTS
waht do the best traders (you) in the world think?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61981344
totally normal activity going on in the world of oil the last few minutes

61981345
I bought some oil stocks, nothing crazy. i have another 100 I want to throw on somthing, what should i do?

61981346
>>61981334
based retard

61981347
>>61981195
I think they are paper shorting oil but there are serious localized oil shocks where oil is trading around $125-150/barrel

61981349
>>61981342
>Im too stupid to articulate my point
Okay kike.

61981351
>>61981345
oil/gas futures

61981352
>>61981284
damn.. I was hoping for one last dip before I go all in on oil but this is making me think it's only going up from now on

61981354
>>61981334
the jig is up, he's in the know

61981357
>>61981294
Reverse contango, backwardation

61981358
>>61981349
I'm afraid I have a rule about not arguing with spastics.
You will learn in your own time.

61981362
someone bake a real thread with a real subject
or else

61981363
>>61981352
It will go up as long as hormuz is closed but that doesn't mean it won't be volatile. Imagine a line that goes up and to the right on average but the actual price dances around it. That's sentiment.
That's also what the stock market looks like if you zoom out. The line that goes steadily up and to the right is earnings increases and dividend yield, while the line going up and down around it is sentiment (the P/E ratio).

61981370
>>61981284
so you are saying the market is gonna break on monday and oil will squeezerino and stocks will crasherino??

61981371
>>61981362
What are you going to short crude again?

61981374
>>61981058
howd you get up to 300k so fast what options did you buy for htat first run? also why did you get so greedy after making more money than any anon here has seen in their life

61981376
>>61981362
only shills bake, and they're off work now

61981377
>>61981358
You have a rule about being a proud inbred Jew.

61981379
>$99

61981382
>>61981284
ok if i put my serious hat on, i think you are looking at it the wrong way
people need oil here and now and today, so they will get ripped off and at the loss to keep things moving
the futures themselves are exactly what their name implies: betting on the future, so instead of thinking the blue line needs to catch up to the white, its actually the white line that will move back towards the blue

61981383
>>61981116
you know this is actaully kike mind programming to implant normality into the goyim subconscious right? this is literally how kikes manipulate us so easily

61981385
>>61981377
Thank you for confirming your spastication. You can carry on arguing with yourself now.

61981387
>>61981379
Close $100+?

61981393
>>61981195
naked shorting paper contracts printed up out of thin air

61981400
>>61981284

61981401
Two more weeks

61981405
>>61981284
If you nibbas would be as shizo towards silver as you would be to oil man...

61981406
>>61981400
>Likely driven by geopolitical factors
Lmao

61981411
>>61981362
>>61981409
>>61981409
>>61981409

61981416
>>61981401
its pretty likely the market pukes on monday, todays action was really nasty

61981811
>>61981058

item.title: Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are… — 244 replies — 20.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are…

Open thread • Replies: 244 • Updated: 2026-03-14 04:01 UTC

OP

Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said
>what do you do to make $125k
>that is a lot
>are you in LA?
>why are you lying?
Then I said
>150k is middle class
>no offense, when others don’t believe others, it means they are poor or make less
Then he replied
>150k is not middle class
>60k-80k is middle class
I said
>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
Then he starts lying and saying he is 13
The conversation is just him seething someone makes $125k and arguing that 150k is not middle class.
I tell him due to increased cost of living and wealth gap, even 1m is nothing and 10% of 50% of the consumption and 90% are not doing well.
Why are poor people always seething?
$125k isn’t even middle class. How poor do you guys that guy is? 40k? 70k?
He was really defensive about $150k being middle class.
Do poor people think they are middle class?
This isn’t the first time this has happened.

Early replies (first 3)

61965995
>>61965964
Middle class is self sufficient, it requires an income that can support a household, retirement, children, education(including college), stay at home wife (or) nanny, 2+ modern cars, insurance, 1-3 vacations/yr . I would say 125k-250k depending on area. Lower class normies think they are middle class, middle class is mostly dead. Upper class has excess income after meeting those needs. Lower class requires gov assistance(welfare, healthcare, public school, etc).

61966005
>>61965964
>>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
When people ssay middle class they mean they've got a wife and together they make about 140k or something and can easily afford a suburban house in areas within 2 hours of major cities, especially in southern and midwestern cities like Omaha and Dallas. Your idea of middle class is jetsetting around and banging sloots whenever you want.

61966016
>>61965995
> 1-3 vacations/yr .
1 vacation, maybe dude.
3? Lmao.
I think middle class lifestyle now requires a lot higher income than what people think now.
That wasn’t the first time someone got really defensive with “no, 60-80k is middle class.”
Fucking annoying but good conversation I guess. The ignorance is annoying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61975068
>>61975034
Close enough, consulting.

61975234
>>61975068
Yeah. Most jobs cap out. Not sure why you were so defensive. My main topic was 50k and 150k.
I was talking to some consulting guy in nyc and I told him I used to make 200k and now retired. And he got so angry and triggered.
>you do NOT make 200k!!!!!
And he said he works for high networth people. But if he did, why was 200k so surprising
(it is because most income caps out and out of the general population, 200k is rarer).
Thing is, most rich people know whats possible so to see him so defensive, he was probably busting his ass for his work.
One thing I learned is well off people always believe others.
Poor people almost always immediately reply with
>no you dont
>yeah and im elon musk
>ur lying

61975263
"Class" is a Marxist term designed to make you hate people richer than yourself.

The terminology falls apart with any examination. For example, a doctor making $500K per year is "working class" because he works, but is in the top 1% of incomes.

If you want to communicate properly, just say high income, middle income, low income, etc.

61975270
>>61975263
A doctor IS working class.
There is working class and capitalist class.

61975379
>>61975270
But a person earning $30K a year can put $3k into a dividend stock and start collecting "surplus value" which Marxists decry as capitalist theft. Is he a working class or capitalist class? What about a worker who slowly invests over 40 years until his dividends pay more than his wage, but he's still working?
The terminology fails hard to communicate anything useful.

61975502
>>61965995
If you can afford a nanny and three vacations a year you are upper class full stop. Most normies get two weeks a year tops, with some uncs capping out at four.

61975528
>>61975379
Posts like yours dont really promote discussion and just shit flinging.
You KNOW what capitalist class and working class is. Why you talking nonsense?
> What about a worker who slowly invests over 40 years until his dividends pay more than his wage, but he's still working?
Obviously after that, then you can start talking about the lifestyle his dividends can bring in.

61975585
>>61975379
Marxists are ugly losers.

61975620
>>61975502
3 vacations. Yeah. Like over a month vacation kek. Normal bottom 90% or even 95% cannot afford this.
And they face high gas prices, air tickets price increases and food inflation due to Iran War lmaoo

61976191
>>61965964
60-80k was middle class before covid. Now it's working poor.

61976253
>>61975263
Retard, class comes from ancient Rome.

61976584
>>61965995
>support a household
>retirement safe
>3 kids
>education & college done, kids will go there too
>insurance
>5 holidays a year
one car only and missing a stay at home wife since we both work
still have excess money.
all this on 50k a year while she makes 40k.
god i love being a euro"poor" lmao

61976633
>>61976584
>5 holidays a year
Lol. Doubt. Unless theyre cheap.
Size of house? Neighborhood? City?
Cost of living in city? What car?

61976651
>>61976584
Or maybe vacations are not overseas. Like flying across the ocean.

61976676
>>61976584
American properties are expensive if on valuable land. So is Europe if you live somewhere desirable.

61976695
>>61976633
>>61976651
>>61976676
attic, basement, 3 bedrooms, kitchen/bathroom/living room and a study room.
yard about the size of the house, wife grows plenty of stuff there for the fun of it and it does save some grocery bills in the end.
car isnt fancy, just a volvo XC60, the city is båstad you can look it up if you want, its 100% white.

but yeah paid sick leave too, union is strong here and my salary have yearly assured raises, life looking good.

61976707
>>61976695
Not bad. Very middle class.
100% white. So…is it vhcol or mcol?

61976727
>>61976695
Based my man.

I recently moved into the german Eifel, roughly 690m2 property with 180m2 living space. House is about done, had to deal with shitty Internet Connection but Starlink rules. It's considerable "cheap" to build here because nobody wants to live on the countryside but countryside only means a 20 minute trip with the nearest train in a European country

Expecting our first kid in august so it will get lively in here. All of this on a 55k home-office job and her working in a close-by cosmetic surgery clinic. Maybe I can take the little one to his first trip to Ibiza somewhat next year, maybe 2 or 3 weeks at once - holiday planning is relaxed but if necessary I'm just gonna take some of that paid sick-leave right before my vacation - lol.

What are they gonna do? Can't fire me - kek.

61981065
itt: many people who don't understand household income and personal income. it's usually calculated per household because usually couples live together and both work.
middle class:
low end household income: 55k
high end: 165k
median: 85k

in california: low end 67k, high end 200k, median 100k.


https://finance.yahoo.com/news/much-money-makes-middle-class-120845381.html

61981175
>>61981065
The entire thread was an argument on whether 60k is middle class or not. Your post just confirmed 60k is middle class. lol.

61981181
>>61981065
Also, America median household income is 60k. 60k to 80k is also fine as a range.

61981822
>>61981175
yeah but there really isn't to argue about, it's simple calculation: middle class = income ranging from two-thirds to twice a state/city/country median household income.

61981851
>>61981181
>America median household income is 60k
no, it's 84k

61981870
>>61965964
The Cantillon Effect benefits those that wisely invest their capital asap. The more you have upfront the better prepared you are to offset inflationary pressures. Being debt-free with assets that generate capital is the goal.

61981927
>>61965964
so you think you can just make up things?
middleclass is calculated by income precentiles and in US middleclass household makes somewere between $25-60k a year.
In some areas it can rise up to $100k, but in these areas you cant get employment unless you are good at higly paid skill.

61981934
>>61981927
You need $150k to afford a middle class lifestyle. 60k is lower class life.

61981947
>>61981934
No, middle class lifestyle is what can be afforded whit money made by given precentile.

you can be too poor for food and still middleclass.

61981949
>>61966005
If your wife is working full time to barely cover a mortgage, then you can't be middle class
Boomers chased all industry out of our countries by demanding they pay what is 75$ an hour to manual laborers

61982212
>>61981947
So by your definition, middle class people making 60-80k pretty much live like lower class.

61983003
100k is 60k from 20 years ago, which is middle class
125k is higher than 100k, so you're middle class depending on expenses and how much you are lying/ delusional about your actual bottom line

item.title: Where were you when the next GFC happened? — 37 replies — 12.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Where were you when the next GFC happened?

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-03-14 12:54 UTC

OP

Except this time, it's in the private credit markets.
>https://www.reuters.com/business/finance/morgan-stanley-restricts-redemptions-private-credit-fund-after-withdrawals-surge-2026-03-11/

Early replies (first 3)

61978788
>>61978743
>Invest in fund that deals with illiquid assets
>Ask for more than the redemption limit
Why are investors like this?

61978797
How does one make money off of this news

61980607
So blehcock and MoronStain are factually bankrupt; Boomer asset "managers" that dont own the assets on their books but used them nevertheless as collateral for ponzis. Its time to kill that generation and its organization, merciless, cold blooded, no exception for the small cogs in the machine. No mercy, no absolution, no tombstone

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61980950
>>61980907
>I-I was just joking
>P-please have a demand for my bags
no

61980967
>>61980950
I'm just relaying to you the public data I see available, "private credit" is a specific tranche of loans that have few collateralized assets, no derivatives, nothing at all like 2008, they aren't even rated by the major agencies.

61981011
>>61978788
You forgot the part where after asking for more than the limit allows, they start screeching about the end of the world.
This is the panic sell off before the big pump.

61981014
>>61980967
>Trusting faked numbers by individuals that have an individual rational reason to fake the numbers
>P-please buy my bag, please don defect, please dont kill us
no

61981024
>>61981014
You're suggesting that banks actually secretly trade more private credit synthetic instruments secretly than they do on high volume public loans? Ok buddy, gonna need proof of that.

61981031
When a blue owl falls in the forest does it make a sound?

61981041
>>61981024
there is nothing secrete about communist entities like "banks" utilizing the assets under management for rehypothecation ponzi games that all depend on two variables; exponential growth of suckers and trust, both variables being negative.
>B-but the rating agency doesn't say so
>B-but the accountancy trickery on the books shows everything is okay
Revenge is served when the opponent is not able to defend itself

61981072
>>61981041
An asset must exist to be rehypothecated. Until you provide proof that these assets exist at the quantities you say they do you just look like a seething chud.

61981086
>>61981072
>b-buy my bag c-chud
>p-please
enjoy the genocide. If I were you I would kill myself now, somebody else making that decision is going to be not in your interest geezer

61981094
>>61981086
Seething so bad, do you get paid a penny per post or what?

61981102
>>61981094
>u-u mad
>p-please be our greatest fool
A look at 2 decades of trust metrics instead of fudged books would make it obvious that neither Millenials nor GenZ is going to take the trajectory GenX took. Enjoy the last 4 months of your life

61981106
>>61981102
Yes yes down with the great Satan inshallah brother! Math is fake and gay!

61981113
>>61981106
You can deflect and project as much as you like geezer, its economically irrational for Millenials and GenZ to trade your genocide, that includes everyone over 50 and everyone that had its hand in the cookie jar of the future for a chair that spins and scraps like GenX. The metrics are clear cut with an very obvious trend and a mathemical deterministic end point of the ponziconomy; March - July 2026

61981121
>>61981113
Very scary much scary. It's almost as scary I'm considered over 50 for not falling for some retards propaganda just because he says there's 6 gorillion loan bonds defaulting right now (but we're not allowed to see them)

61981129
>>61981121
Consult the yield curve and the bid to cover

61981141
>>61981129
>Yield curve
The non-existent one for the tiny private debt sector, or the non-existent one for your fake 6 gorillion private debt bundles.

>Bid to cover
Does not exist for private securities kekw

61981148
>>61981141
lol. The tertiary to nth layer ponzis are not going to survive the collapse of primary and secondary layer ponzis they rely on. The auction clock hits 16:59, bid to cover 0.32

61981156
>>61981148
Oh you just wanted to insert your slop into a thread that had zilch to do with your slop and then just pretend it's related despite not understanding anything about either market. Coolbeans

61981173
>>61981156
as stated before, your deflection, projection and faked irony posting is not going to change anything. Its a simple mathematical function and generational individual rational acting. But hold onto the bags and believe whatever you want. Its not 2008, in 2008 there was a sliver of hope, in 2026 there is only wishful thinking of the baggies

61981185
>>61981173
>It's not 2008
Yes is what I've been saying all along, not even regular slop but AI slop? Corny anon

61981197
>>61981185
There is no road to kick a can, neither is there a way to sell to kick a can. But keep on deflecting, keep on projecting keep on fake defensive irony posting; revenge is served when the opponent is without defense and requires cooperation which is irrational to provide

61981213
>>61981197
I'm literally on Treasury direct, the bid to cover for all of these recent auctions and buybacks are above 2.0, I think you're just making shit up

61981240
>>61981213
the trend is clear.

61981247
>>61981240
I don't think it's clear at all that appears above 2.0 pretty consistently

61981255
>>61981247
The slop is down, and its only march. The FED is already in a panic, and its only March

61983335
>>61980671
The Great Taking is knockin' on the door.

61983407
WTF are private credit markets? WTF are private credit funds? WTF are they investing in?

61983412
>>61983407
what is the black pool

61983452
>>61983407
A lot of it is just ownership in private companies, mostly mid sized, but some of them quite small, like a local HVAC or plumbing company.
The problem is, it's hard to value these companies if the metric is something other than straight profitability. How do analysts properly value hundreds or even thousands of private companies? In a downturn, these companies look artificially more stable than public companies, because they don't see hourly fluctuations, but the downside is that a company can be silently failing, and then one day it just gets written down 80% out of the blue.

61983817
>>61983452
And as soon as somebody wants his investment back, cash out, there is obviously no liquidity to redeem and no bid to sell the company and generate liquidity. Its a ponzi scheme and as its a secondary layer ponzi scheme, the tertiary to nth layer collapses with it.

item.title: Chilling w/ Rich People — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chilling w/ Rich People

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-14 15:45 UTC

OP

I just spent 3 days working/chilling with people worth over 100 mil in a major city. I am a poor.

AMA

Early replies (first 3)

61984154
>>61984144
Rich people are always fascinated by my poorfag stories.

61984159
Zased. One time I spent a few days chilling with my rich Jordanian friends in Cinncinati and they gave me a 2025 m3 comp to drive while I was there and took me to an expensive steakhouse

Unfortunately my friend’s whore wife’s cousin got caught funneling money from his business and the whore sided with the cousin and ended up divorcing my friend, haven’t really see him since then

61984200
>>61984154
These ones didn't care about mine. They just say "oh cool" and move on, that was last time I chilled with them. We bonded with one because he gets employees from Eastern Europe and underpays them and I am from Eastern Europe, so I made jokes about how he has slave labor, he enjoyed that one. I grew up in a room in a communal Soviet block with a shared bathroom with no shower, so I have good ones, like the neighbor prostitutes autistic son drawing on the walls with shit while she is whoring in the room next door. Her titties were fine though, sometimes I wonder if she would have let me touch them at 7 years old, because why not, whore anyway.

>>61984159
I am not that poor biw, I am just old and a wagie, my poor friends have new Supras and 700whp MR2s with smooth boost that keep up with ZR1s, so M3 comp wouldn't be an event for me.

The rich fags absolutely do not flex cars since it's considered tacky. A previous story from chilling with them is that one of the kids at the company cashed in his equity and got a 718 and then the founder brutally smoked him in his Plaid. Note - I am not a fan of Tesla, but it was still funny. I think the kid didn't really know how to drop gears to drag either, so it was just bad.

But yea, these fags flex their private jet (emphasis on jet, not plane), but they still share it.

Oh, and they made fun of Cincinnati. They went to Jeff Ruby's and one of them cut up the table cloth and ran around with it.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: It's over for US — 18 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
It's over for US

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-14 14:25 UTC

OP

It's over for US

Early replies (first 3)

61980300
2008 buck broke Gen X bankers

61981493
As eurofag, how do I benefit from this?

61981496
>>61980293
Should I buy or sell?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61981517
>>61981496
Buy high, sell low

61981532
>>61981493
you dont. just look at eu stocks during 2008 and covid. on top of all energy prices/inflation is going to spike up so future rate hikes. also look at the eur/usd. the euro is losing against the usd.

61981536
>>61980293
Speak for Eurself

61981546
>>61980293
Bullish long term. We need a market crash. Gen x thought they were going to retire??? Lol and lmao

61981550
>>61980293
It will be worse. How can I invest in the bailout?

61981602
>>61980293
America has gone full circle

61981609
Every republican presidency ends in a recession

61983415
>>61981493
Physical silver coins.

61983652
>>61980293
Bottom signal

61983711
I'm just praying for 40% labor participation rate here in the united states. we need to offshore maxx + ai agent maxx. just imagine the sheer seethe and cope of people wandering the streets and scrolling tiktok at home because there's nothing to do. the mass demoralization will give ease and comfort knowing that we are now all suffering together and we can finally recognize our humanity. for we must all live in a communal hell. I do not care for the ones above in heaven, I could care less. just as long as most of suffer im glad to be in pain. just be in pain with me! I want everyone to hurt with me!

61983741
>>61981493
You sell US index futures when they break relevant trendlines/moving averages/market profile POC/VWAP areas on a carefully timed sequence of trades with 1-2% of your account. But don't do that because you'll do it wrong with 50% of your account 'hurr time to short this rapidly parabolic sudden spike!' and be ruined like every other retard here.

61983763
>>61980293
You know why michael burry is famous? Because he was one of the small group of people that predicted the crash. Crashes happen when most people are not predicting a crash, not when everyone is saying that a crash is coming.
Have fun being sidelined

61983870
>>61981493
BTC, gold and silver (physical preferably)

61983963
>>61983763
2026 is a pump year.

61983982
>>61983963
chart is wrong and you must be retarded for posting it, as you are unable to verify.

quit acting like smart individual you are only a midwit.
